channel.title: Launchctl on Margrop Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Launchctl on Margrop Blog

item.title: Install Frp client on Mac and use remote desktop
item.description: You can install it with Homebrew. The following section shows the old manual extraction method. Keep reading if you want that approach. brew install frpc vi /usr/local/etc/frp/frpc.ini brew services start frpc Download the Darwin package from FRP releases and unzip it omitted Copy the executable sudo mv ~/Downloads/frp_0.34.3_darwin_amd64/frpc /usr/local/bin/ Add the frpc configuration file Adjust server_addr, server_port, and remote_port as needed. Edit the auto-start configuration Commands related to auto-start sudo su cat>/etc/frpc.
